info.name: Media Frames
info.summary: Turn any screen into a media frame — photos, videos, PDFs and more
info.description:
Display photos, videos, PDFs and Office documents from your Nextcloud albums or folders on any screen.
Features: - Mix and match multiple albums and folders as sources for a single frame - Videos play to completion before advancing to the next item - PDFs and Office presentations rendered via Nextcloud preview - Optional device password to restrict who can view a frame URL - Lightweight frontend optimised for low-power devices like Raspberry Pi
info.author: Thomas Grameld
